title: BhashaSarthi
description: BhashaSarthi, your trusted language translation companion, transcends linguistic barriers seamlessly, enabling effortless communication across a multitude of languages. Whether converting text to speech or facilitating speech-to-text conversion, it fosters smooth global connectivity, mutual understanding, collaboration, and synergy.

title: Junkie(Discord Bot)
description: JunkieBot, the all-in-one server management solution, empowers administrators with an array of versatile tools. From streamlined channel management to user moderation functionalities like banning and kicking, alongside features like avatar display and message pruning, it optimizes server operations while enriching user engagement.

title: ChatWallah
description: Chatwallah is a Python application showcasing how to create a real-time chat room using Flask and SocketIO. This tutorial project aims to guide developers in building a live chat application with Python. By exploring this example, developers can grasp the fundamentals of implementing real-time features and enhancing user interaction through web sockets
